creator: syah@morphium.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA512

So, since I am running on new hardware, and some googling on the last
panic indicated possible RAM issues, I ran  memtest86 on the system
overnight for good measure, since this is all new HW and previously
untested.

2 3+ hours tests came back 100% fine.
- -- 
Ryan Stark
